case_title: SHEILA QUINN VS. MARLYN SPELLER et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINN, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPELLER, MARLYN FRENCH SPELLER, EDDY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,057.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSIT, PLUS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2,500.00 - AS PENALTIES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5.
